# Credit Card Handling Shadow Spec

> Credit Card Handling - Manages credit card liability accounts with reserved payment tracking and Safe to Spend integration

**Status:** Planned
**Generated by:** spec-lead + @pseudo-worker

---

```sudolang
import("specs/ARCHITECTURE.md")
import("specs/DB_DESIGN.md")
import("specs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md")
import("specs/FEATURES.md")
import("specs/DEPENDENCIES.md")
```

## Architecture

```sudolang
// Package-by-Feature Structure
// src/commonMain/kotlin/com/petergabriel/budgetcalendar/features/creditcard/
// ├── data/
// │   ├── local/           # SQLDelight queries (credit_card_settings.sq)
// │   ├── repository/      # CreditCardRepositoryImpl
// │   └── mapper/          # CreditCardMapper
// ├── domain/
// │   ├── model/           # CreditCardSettings, CreditCardSummary
// │   ├── repository/      # ICreditCardRepository interface
// │   └── usecase/         # Use cases for CC operations
// └── presentation/
//     ├── CreditCardViewModel.kt
//     └── CreditCardUiState.kt
```

---

## Data Model

```sudolang
// Domain Models

interface CreditCardSettings {
  id: Long;
  accountId: Long;           // FK → accounts.id where type = 'credit_card'
  creditLimit: Long?;        // In cents, optional
  statementBalance: Long?;   // In cents, user-entered
  dueDate: Long?;            // Unix timestamp ms, next payment due
  createdAt: Long;           // Unix timestamp ms
  updatedAt: Long;
}

interface CreditCardSummary {
  accountId: Long;
  accountName: String;
  currentBalance: Long;      // Current CC balance in cents (negative = owed)
  reservedAmount: Long;      // Sum of pending/overdue expenses on this CC
  statementBalance: Long?;   // User-entered statement balance
  creditLimit: Long?;        // Optional credit limit
  availableCredit: Long?;    // creditLimit - abs(currentBalance), null if no limit set
  dueDate: Long?;            // Next payment due date
}

// Request Models

interface CreateCreditCardSettingsRequest {
  accountId: Long;
  creditLimit: Long?;
  statementBalance: Long?;
  dueDate: Long?;
}

interface UpdateCreditCardSettingsRequest {
  creditLimit: Long?;
  statementBalance: Long?;
  dueDate: Long?;
}

// UI State Model

interface CreditCardUiState {
  creditCards: List<CreditCardSummary>;
  selectedCard: CreditCardSummary?;
  selectedCardSettings: CreditCardSettings?;
  isLoading: Boolean;
  isPaymentSheetVisible: Boolean;
  suggestedPaymentAmount: Long;  // = reservedAmount of selected card
  error: String?;
}
```

---

## Constraints

```sudolang
Constraint: Credit Card accounts are liability accounts — balance displayed as negative (owed)
Constraint: When an EXPENSE is recorded on a CC account, it must be deducted from Safe to Spend immediately (CC-002)
Constraint: "Reserved for CC Payment" = sum of all pending/overdue EXPENSE transactions on that CC (CC-003)
Constraint: CC payment is a TRANSFER from a spending pool account to the CC account (CC-004)
Constraint: CC payment TRANSFER must NOT double-deduct from Safe to Spend — the expense already deducted when incurred (CC-005)
Constraint: Each CC account has independent reserved amounts (CC-006)
Constraint: Statement balance is user-entered and separate from calculated balance (CC-007)
Constraint: When a CC payment is confirmed, the reserved amount must decrease by the confirmed expenses covered (CC-008)
Constraint: CreditCardSettings can only be created for accounts with type = 'credit_card'
Constraint: All monetary values stored as Long (cents)
Constraint: creditLimit, statementBalance, dueDate are all optional — user may not set them
```

---

## Data Flow

```sudolang
// Get Credit Card Summaries Flow
ViewModel.init() |> GetCreditCardSummariesUseCase.execute()
  |> ICreditCardRepository.getAllSettings()
  |> ForEach setting |> IAccountRepository.getById(setting.accountId)
  |> ForEach (account, setting) |> CalculateReservedAmountUseCase.execute(accountId)
  |> Map to List<CreditCardSummary>
  |> Emit Flow<List<CreditCardSummary>>

// Calculate Reserved Amount Flow
accountId |> CalculateReservedAmountUseCase.execute(accountId)
  |> ITransactionRepository.getPendingAndOverdueByAccount(accountId)
  |> Filter type == EXPENSE
  |> Sum amounts
  |> Return Result<Long>

// Make CC Payment Flow (TRANSFER)
User selects CC + payment amount + source account
  |> ValidatePayment (amount > 0, source != destination, source exists, dest is CC)
  |> MakeCreditCardPaymentUseCase.execute(sourceAccountId, ccAccountId, amount)
  |> CreateTransactionUseCase.execute(type = TRANSFER, from = source, to = CC)
  |> Return Result<Transaction>
  |> Update CreditCardUiState

// Update CC Settings Flow
User edits CC settings (credit limit, statement balance, due date)
  |> validateSettings
  |> UpdateCreditCardSettingsUseCase.execute(accountId, request)
  |> ICreditCardRepository.update(accountId, request)
  |> Return Result<CreditCardSettings>
  |> Update CreditCardUiState

// Auto-Create Settings for New CC Account Flow
Account created with type = CREDIT_CARD
  |> CreateCreditCardSettingsUseCase.execute(accountId)
  |> ICreditCardRepository.insert(settings with all optional fields null)
  |> Return Result<CreditCardSettings>

// Safe to Spend Integration Flow (modifies existing budget calculation)
CalculateSafeToSpendUseCase.execute()
  |> Get spending pool balances
  |> Subtract pending/overdue from spending pool accounts
  |> Subtract pending/overdue EXPENSES on CC accounts (already counted via CC-002)
  |> NOTE: CC payment TRANSFERs are NOT subtracted again (CC-005 anti-double-deduction)
  |> Return Result<Long>
```

---

## Function Signatures

```sudolang
// Use Cases
fn GetCreditCardSummaries(): Flow<List<CreditCardSummary>>
fn GetCreditCardSummaryById(accountId: Long): Result<CreditCardSummary>
fn CalculateReservedAmount(accountId: Long): Result<Long>
fn MakeCreditCardPayment(sourceAccountId: Long, ccAccountId: Long, amount: Long, date: Long): Result<Transaction>
fn CreateCreditCardSettings(accountId: Long): Result<CreditCardSettings>
fn UpdateCreditCardSettings(accountId: Long, req: UpdateCreditCardSettingsRequest): Result<CreditCardSettings>
fn GetCreditCardSettings(accountId: Long): Result<CreditCardSettings>

// Repository Interface — ICreditCardRepository
fn getAllSettings(): Flow<List<CreditCardSettings>>
fn getSettingsByAccountId(accountId: Long): Result<CreditCardSettings>
fn insert(settings: CreditCardSettings): Result<CreditCardSettings>
fn update(accountId: Long, creditLimit: Long?, statementBalance: Long?, dueDate: Long?): Result<CreditCardSettings>
fn delete(accountId: Long): Result<Unit>

// Existing repository additions
// ITransactionRepository — add query:
fn getPendingAndOverdueExpensesByAccount(accountId: Long): Result<List<Transaction>>
```

## UI Components

```sudolang
// CreditCardDetailSheet Props
interface CreditCardDetailSheetProps {
  summary: CreditCardSummary;
  settings: CreditCardSettings;
  onMakePayment: () -> Unit;
  onEditSettings: () -> Unit;
  onDismiss: () -> Unit;
}

// CreditCardPaymentSheet Props
interface CreditCardPaymentSheetProps {
  ccSummary: CreditCardSummary;
  suggestedAmount: Long;       // = reservedAmount
  spendingPoolAccounts: List<Account>;
  onConfirmPayment: (sourceAccountId: Long, amount: Long) -> Unit;
  onCancel: () -> Unit;
}

// CreditCardSettingsForm Props
interface CreditCardSettingsFormProps {
  initialSettings: CreditCardSettings?;
  onSave: (UpdateCreditCardSettingsRequest) -> Unit;
  onCancel: () -> Unit;
}

// CreditCardListItem Props — for Accounts screen
interface CreditCardListItemProps {
  summary: CreditCardSummary;
  onTap: () -> Unit;
}

// Reference existing design system components used:
// - XOueE (Card / Dark) — used for CC account card display
// - Ks9uf (Transaction Item) — used for CC transaction list
// - CVw4C (Badge / Pending) — used for reserved amount badge
// - ywlyv (Badge / Overdue) — used for overdue CC payments
// - c9XFF (Input Group) — used in CC settings form
// - mbxe4 (Button / Primary) — used for "Make Payment" CTA
// - L2zpZ (Form / Large Amount Input) — used for payment amount entry
// - 0yIOD (Hero / Safe to Spend) — shows CC impact on Safe to Spend
```

---

## Database Schema

```sudolang
// Table already defined in specs/DB_DESIGN.md — credit_card_settings

table credit_card_settings {
  id: Long PK AUTOINCREMENT
  account_id: Long NOT NULL FK → accounts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
  credit_limit: Long?              // In cents, nullable
  statement_balance: Long?         // In cents, nullable
  due_date: Long?                  // Unix timestamp ms, nullable
  created_at: Long NOT NULL        // Unix timestamp ms
  updated_at: Long NOT NULL        // Unix timestamp ms
}

index idx_cc_settings_account ON credit_card_settings(account_id)
```

---

## SQLDelight Queries

```sudolang
// credit_card_settings.sq

// getAllCreditCardSettings :many
SELECT * FROM credit_card_settings ORDER BY created_at DESC;

// getCreditCardSettingsByAccountId :one
SELECT * FROM credit_card_settings WHERE account_id = :accountId;

// insertCreditCardSettings :one
INSERT INTO credit_card_settings (account_id, credit_limit, statement_balance, due_date, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (:accountId, :creditLimit, :statementBalance, :dueDate, :createdAt, :updatedAt)
RETURNING *;

// updateCreditCardSettings :one
UPDATE credit_card_settings
SET credit_limit = :creditLimit, statement_balance = :statementBalance,
    due_date = :dueDate, updated_at = :updatedAt
WHERE account_id = :accountId
RETURNING *;

// deleteCreditCardSettings :exec
DELETE FROM credit_card_settings WHERE account_id = :accountId;

// getCreditCardReservedAmount :one
// Sum of pending/overdue EXPENSE amounts on a specific CC account
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS reserved
FROM transactions
WHERE account_id = :accountId
AND type = 'expense'
AND status IN ('pending', 'overdue')
AND is_sandbox = 0;

// getAllCreditCardReservedAmounts :many
// Per-account reserved amounts for all CC accounts
SELECT t.account_id, COALESCE(SUM(t.amount), 0) AS reserved
FROM transactions t
JOIN accounts a ON t.account_id = a.id
WHERE a.type = 'credit_card'
AND t.type = 'expense'
AND t.status IN ('pending', 'overdue')
AND t.is_sandbox = 0
GROUP BY t.account_id;
```

## Dependencies

```sudolang
// External Dependencies — only what this feature uses
Dependency: sqldelight — Database queries and credit_card_settings table
Dependency: koin — DI for repository, use cases, ViewModel
Dependency: kotlinx-coroutines — Flow for reactive CC summary updates
Dependency: kotlinx-datetime — Due date display formatting

// Internal Dependencies
Dependency: core/database — SQLDelight queries for credit_card_settings
Dependency: core/utils/CurrencyUtils — Formatting CC amounts for display
Dependency: core/utils/DateUtils — Formatting due dates
Dependency: features/accounts — Account model and IAccountRepository (CC is an account type)
Dependency: features/transactions — Transaction model, ITransactionRepository (CC expenses, payments)
Dependency: features/budget — CalculateSafeToSpendUseCase (CC integration for anti-double-deduction)
```

---

## Edge Cases

| Case | Condition | Handling |
|------|-----------|----------|
| Pay CC more than reserved | payment amount > reservedAmount | Allow with confirmation dialog: "Payment exceeds reserved amount" |
| CC with no pending expenses | reservedAmount == 0 | Show $0 reserved, "Make Payment" still available |
| Multiple CC accounts | user has > 1 CC | Show per-CC reserved amounts, independent summaries |
| Zero balance CC with reserved | balance == 0 but reserved > 0 | Show reserved separately from balance |
| CC payment from non-pool account | source account not in spending pool | Allow — no Safe to Spend impact since source wasn't in pool |
| CC payment to non-CC account | destination type != CREDIT_CARD | Reject: "Destination must be a credit card account" |
| Delete CC account | Account has credit_card_settings | CASCADE delete removes settings; transactions check per ACC-007 |
| Create non-CC account with settings | account type != CREDIT_CARD | Reject: "Credit card settings can only be created for credit card accounts" |
| CC with no settings record | CC account exists but no credit_card_settings row | Auto-create settings on first access with null optional fields |
| Statement balance > credit limit | statementBalance > creditLimit | Allow — user may have exceeded limit |
| Negative credit limit | creditLimit < 0 | Reject: "Credit limit must be positive" |
| CC expense while Safe to Spend is $0 | spending pool balance = 0 | Allow expense but show warning: Safe to Spend goes negative |
| Confirm CC payment transfer | TRANSFER confirmed from checking → CC | Reserved amount decreases; CC balance increases; checking balance decreases; no double-deduction from Safe to Spend |
